name: Poor Knights of Windsor
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Bread, up to 8 (crusts removed, cut into triangles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the raspberries with confectioners' sugar and crush them gently using a fork.
2. Set aside.
3. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form.
4. Place the sherry in one bowl and the lightly beaten egg yolks in another.
5. Dip each bread slice first in the sherry, then in the egg yolks.
6. Melt the butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
7. When the butter is hot, fry the bread slices on both sides until golden brown.
8. Transfer the slices to a warm serving dish and sprinkle each side with a little cinnamon.
9. Place a few raspberries on each slice of toasted bread.
10. Cover with a dollop of whipped cream.
11. Serve 4-6 people.
